title: comastoma pulmonarium subsp. arrectum
intro: Comastoma pulmonarium subsp. arrectum, also known as Lungwort or Pulmonaria arrecta, is a flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties that can help to soothe respiratory issues and coughs. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote the clearance of mucus from the lungs. Comastoma pulmonarium subsp. arrectum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
